privileged_info_summary: HealthSpring (formerly Cigna HealthSpring) is a real insurance company headquartered at 500 Great Circle Road, Nashville, TN 37228. The customer service phone number (800) 668-3813 and CMS payer ID 62308 are verified and correct for Cigna. However, the exact name 'Cigna Health Spring' (with space between Health and Spring) does not match official brand names—the company is officially branded as either 'HealthSpring' (as of March 2025/2026) or 'Cigna HealthSpring' (historical). The data is synthetic (created by task setup), but based on real insurance company information with one name variant.
